# usePreferredDark

Reactive dark theme preference.

**Package:** `@vueuse/core`
**Category:** Browser

## Usage

```ts
import { usePreferredDark } from '@vueuse/core'

const isDark = usePreferredDark()
```

## Reference

[VueUse Docs](https://vueuse.org/core/usePreferredDark/)
